description: Amorphous, mindless predators — acidic blobs, slimes, and gelatinous dungeon hazards.
creatures: Black Pudding
A tar-black ooze that dissolves flesh and metal alike and splits into two when struck.
Ochre Jelly
A yellow, quivering blob immune to slashing that squeezes through the thinnest cracks to reach prey.
Gray Ooze
A puddle of wet-stone camouflage that corrodes metal armor and weapons on contact.
Green Slime
A ceiling-clinging horror that drops onto victims and slowly dissolves them alive.
Gelatinous Cube
A transparent, corridor-filling cube that engulfs victims whole and displays their bones suspended within.
Crystal Ooze
A glittering, translucent slime that refracts light into blinding rainbows and grows crystalline spines.
Acid Slime
A sizzling green puddle that eats through stone, metal, and bone without slowing.
Frost Ooze
A glacial blue slime that flash-freezes anything it touches and creeps forward in crackling silence.
Magma Ooze
A bubbling pool of living lava that oozes forward, charring stone and igniting everything nearby.
Psychic Ooze
A shimmering, iridescent slime that drains memories and emotions from nearby minds.
